item.title: Poland is not joking. Polish TV: "The plane with the war criminal has just landed."
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.title: I made a Bigger, Gayer sword.
item.description:
Sorry for the Pirate Face but it hard to hold one handed.
I seem to remember that it's like... 35lbs? Hardox blade.
The tip of the pommel has been reinforced with hardfacing.
Fluffy cloud guard forge from 1/8" steel.
The Blade is about 55" long, the sword is like.... 75" long?
Here is Video of me making it: https://youtu.be/lSzzB5jc17M
item.dc:creator: michaelcthulhu

item.title: Tussley Dumple
item.dc:creator: TheWoodsAreVile

item.title: ICE brutal attack unarmed veteran Portland
item.description: Portland has been standing up to ICE everyday. ICE is not allowed to abuse unarmed citizens expressing their First Amendment rights. Report this violation of ICE's city permit and call to revoke it. Make it impossible to ignore. Contact City Code Enforcement- Call: 503-823-2633 or Email: codec@portlandoregon.gov I am reporting a violation of the Conditional Use Permit for the ICE Facility at 4310 S Macadam Ave. The property's permit requires that they will not pose an unreasonable safety threat for nearby uses and residents. On August 13th 2025 at 10:20PM, DHS agents deployed tear gas and fired less-lethal bullets from the roof at civilians peacefully demonstrating on the public sidewalk. A US military veteran who was standing on the sidewalk and was not blocking any entrances to the facility was violently attacked from behind, assaulted, and was pinned to the ground and made to endure teargas for almost two full minutes as 3 DHS agents lay on top of him. This incident is a clear example of unreasonable safety threats to the public, residents of the neighborhood, the environment, and public Right Of Way. I am requesting that DHS's actions at the ICE facility be investigated as a violation of the facility's permit conditions."
item.dc:creator: AnonymousMockingjay

item.dc:creator: JasonM1

item.title: Azuma cosplay (Azur Lane)
item.description: *Everything you see is pretty much handmade by me (except for the shoes, obviously). The accessories and details were modelled in Blender and then 3D printed. They made for good practice since I have plans to model something quiiite challenging in the near future! (: **You can also find me on: •Reddit: https://reddit.com/u/aniku_ •Instagram: https://instagram.com/anna_himejima_cos •Personal Instagram: https://instagram.com/anna_himejima (out of cosplay)

item.dc:creator: BenntheNinja

item.title: America Memes Vol 4
item.description: I'm picking back up where I left off clearing out some of the memes I spent a frankly absurd amount of time organizing into folders on my phone. As always, I Hope you all enjoyed. I used to post all of the links to my past posts below but the ends of these posts were getting a bit unwieldy. So, at the risk of overcomplicating things I've made a few (sometimes pretty loosely) categorized repositories of my past posts if you'd like to see more I'll link to those below. Movies, TV, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/qWQKZr5 Books, Comics, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/0unBaDX Gaming, Tech, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/17tib1E Food, Family, and Animals https://imgur.com/gallery/zlsjOQa Work, Politics and America https://imgur.com/gallery/zQrWXQE ADHD, Autism, Mental Health, and Millenial https://imgur.com/gallery/G1E6yWd NSFW Memes https://imgur.com/gallery/2I9HXEp Reactions https://imgur.com/gallery/uDjMX0P
item.dc:creator: GeeeButtersnaps

item.title: protesters blasting vietnam war propaganda at marines in LA
item.dc:creator: Dr3sd4

item.title: I wasn’t sure how to tell you all…
item.description:
The fosterer taking care of Tony texted me this morning. He didn’t make it. The writing was on the wall when we weighed him yesterday and he had lost 20 grams.
I’m so sorry to have to share this news with you all. RIP Tony. We did everything we could. We will never forget you.
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: Carrie Fisher (RIP) giving Lucas shit
item.description: It's not easy to be a Princess for millions of nerds to fantasize about. Carrie should have given George TONS of crap for it before she passed from this life. Oh wait. She DID!! I hope you smile or crack a mental smirk today, from this or an unrelated thing - even if only a brief moment. Cheers!!
item.dc:creator: epicurusaquinas

item.title: Some good news: Onyx is thriving!
item.description:
Jene sent me some videos of my god-kitten Onyx. He’s doing so well!
He is eating like a champ
And he’s also very snuggly. Look at that face!
Oh my god and his purrs!! We’re taking him back to the vet next Friday to hear what the board-certified radiologist has to say about his X-rays and figure out the next steps. I’ll be sure to update!
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: ICM QUALITY MIX - Vol.82 A THOUSAND CUTS
item.description:
COVER ARTIST: Mam BA
ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] Thanks Ms Panda - Fauxe YouTube: https://youtu.be/l86cXyklZxQ?si=ZN-_65KLWOjaZC4b Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/7AymSDcECfA5rPYAydjgBX?si=40b55d82789f445e
Mam BA
JeeHyung Lee
Vladimir Krisetskiy
Rui Guo
Dapeng Song
Tatyana Kupriyanova
Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 ICM SQUAD: @vazquezdaniel, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @onewallpaperaweek, @thedownlowe, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @bagoffishstix, @JayKillBam, @majkongskull, @DingoJ0nes, @HandsomePenguin, @MrJwinkyface, @Gorgoror, @ciadmillefailte, @kaeldra ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Please note that we do not claim ownership of any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort that goes into compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos
